text:
Glockenspiel Beth is a major character in the episode Mortyplicity, and is one of the many Beth Smith decoys. She built a peaceful community with many Smith family decoys before they were betrayed by Glockenspiel Jerry, leading to her and many other decoys being killed by the squids.

After scarecrow variants of the Smith family kidnap another decoy Smith family, Glockenspiel Beth and her version of the Smith family intervenes, saving the other Smith family from the scarecrow versions. They do not care for killing other decoys, instead saving as many as they can. They take their counterparts into a canyon, where a community of various decoys hides underground. As Glockenspiel Beth creates peace with the community of decoys, the squids attack them, causing Glockenspiel Jerry to lock himself in the escape route with a can of varnish, effectively leaving Glockenspiel Beth and the rest of the decoys to die.
